title: Internal Rule Governance and Change Management Policy
summary: Internal policy governing changes to regulatory calculation rules, reference data, and jurisdiction overlays. Ensures all rule changes are documented, approved, tested, and auditable.

key_requirements.title: Rule versioning
key_requirements.description: All regulatory rules and reference data must be versioned with effective dates

key_requirements.title: Change approval
key_requirements.description: Rule changes require approval from risk management and compliance before implementation

key_requirements.title: Rule testing
key_requirements.description: All rule changes must be validated against golden test cases before deployment

key_requirements.title: Audit trail
key_requirements.description: Complete audit trail of all rule changes including who, what, when, why

key_requirements.title: Reconciliation
key_requirements.description: Rule changes must include reconciliation between old and new calculations

engineering_implications.description: Implement versioned reference data with effective date tracking
Log all rule changes with full context and approval chain
Maintain golden test suite for regression testing of rule changes
Support parallel calculation with old and new rules for reconciliation
